description_long: This is a fictional, futuristic fighter airplane with a distinctive X-shaped wing configuration, reminiscent of science fiction spacecraft. The fuselage is metallic gray with red and blue accent markings, and the cockpit is enclosed with a blue-tinted canopy. Four cylindrical engines are mounted at the ends of the wings, each with visible exhaust ports and red highlights. The wings are straight and extend outward from the central body, with mechanical details and panel lines visible on the surfaces. The airplane features a compact, streamlined nose and a rear section with no visible traditional tail assembly, emphasizing its advanced, unconventional design.
description: A metallic gray, sci-fi fighter airplane with X-shaped wings, blue-tinted cockpit, and red and blue accents. Four engines are mounted at the wing tips, and the design is sleek and futuristic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the X-shaped wing configuration, blue cockpit canopy, and four engine intakes with red highlights.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, straight wings, and the alignment of the engines along the wings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the engine exhausts, red accents, and the angular, mechanical details of the wings and fuselage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the straight wings, engine placement, and the streamlined nose profile.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, straight wings with an X-shaped configuration and no visible winglets; wings are mounted symmetrically with slight dihedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Four cylindrical jet engines mounted at the ends of each wing.
attribute_tail_design: No conventional tail; features an integrated rear fuselage with no vertical or horizontal stabilizers visible.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No landing gear visible in the images.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single blue-tinted canopy, likely single-seat.
